arguments.expression: console.log('=== window.screen Test ==='); try { console.log('window.screen exists:', typeof window.screen); if (window.screen) { console.log('✅ window.screen properties:'); console.log('  width:', window.screen.width); console.log('  height:', window.screen.height); console.log('  availWidth:', window.screen.availWidth); console.log('  availHeight:', window.screen.availHeight); console.log('  colorDepth:', window.screen.colorDepth); console.log('  pixelDepth:', window.screen.pixelDepth); console.log('  orientation:', typeof window.screen.orientation); if (window.screen.orientation) { console.log('  orientation.angle:', window.screen.orientation.angle); console.log('  orientation.type:', window.screen.orientation.type); } console.log('✅ window.screen working perfectly!'); } } catch (e) { console.log('❌ Error:', e.message); }
